SEARCH
Package controller

Class LoadGameController

java.lang.Object
controller.BaseController
controller.LoadGameController
public class LoadGameController extends BaseController
Controller responsible for managing the loading and deletion of saved game data. This controller handles interactions with the LoadGamePanel and coordinates with other controllers and the model to load saved games and handle save deletion.

  • Constructor Details

    • LoadGameController

      private LoadGameController()
      Private constructor to initialize listeners for UI components and set up actions for loading and deleting game saves.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static LoadGameController getInstance()
      Retrieves the single instance of LoadGameController. If the instance is null, it creates one.
      Returns:
      the instance of LoadGameController

    • pressButtonX

      private void pressButtonX(int nSave)
      Handles the process of deleting a save slot, updates the saves file, and refreshes the menu with updated save information.
      Parameters:
      nSave - the number of the save slot to delete

    • deleteSave

      private void deleteSave(int nSave)
      Deletes the data for the specified save slot from the saves file.
      Parameters:
      nSave - the number of the save slot to delete

    • checkSave

      private void checkSave()
      This method checks if a save file exists at the specified file path. If the file does not exist, it creates a new file.

    • loadGame

      private void loadGame(String[] matchData)
      Loads a saved game using the data from the specified line in the saves file, constructs player objects, updates the game panel, and switches to the gamePanel view.
      Parameters:
      matchData - line the line number in the saves file containing the saved game data

    • recoverData

      private String[] recoverData(int line)
      Retrieves the saved game data from the specified line in the saves file.
      Parameters:
      line - the line number in the saves file containing the saved game data
      Returns:
      an array containing the data for the saved game
